productDisplayName: Nike Men Air Pegasus Grey Sports Shoes
description: With legendry cushioning and absolute support, the nike Air Pegasus+ running shoe works great for mild underpronators and overpronators. Replete with low-profile cushioning and ample ventilation, the nike Air Pegasus+ also features a Nike+ option that allows you to use compatible iPods, stop watches and much more to clock your fitness regime.UpperMeshed upper for maximum ventilationBootie that wraps around the foot offering a snug, breathable, comfort FitStrategically placed synthetic overlays with added TPU skeleton at the back foot for better shoe structure, full range of motion and secure fitFlywire technology for premium, lightweight supportExternal heel counter to wrap the heel for a snug, secure fitLace-up system and padded mesh sockliner for snug, breathable fitCushioned sockliner that moulds to the foot, offering a custom fit and great supportReflective elements for enhanced visibility in low light conditionsMidsolePremium Cushlon foam midsole for soft, responsive cushioning and supportNike Zoom unit in the heel for low-profile, responsive cushioningSegmented crash pad for shock absorption, delivering a smooth rideOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with waffle pattern lugs for maximum traction and stabilityHeel pad made of BRS 1000 rubber for abrasion resistanceToe guard reinforced for forefoot protectionShoe careWipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlight
